mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN wo.order_status IN (0, 1) THEN 1 END) AS pendingOrders, COUNT(CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(wo.create_time, '%Y%m') = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m') THEN 1 END) AS monthOrders, ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN wo.order_status IN (4, 5) THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / GREATEST(COUNT(1), 1), 1) AS completionRate, COUNT(CASE WHEN wo.fault_level = 1 AND wo.order_status NOT IN (4, 5, 6) THEN 1 END) AS alarmCount FROM tbl_work_order wo WHERE wo.deleted = 0

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%m-%d') AS day, COUNT(1) AS count FROM tbl_work_order WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) AND deleted = 0 GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d')

SELECT wo.order_status AS `key`, CASE wo.order_status WHEN 0 THEN '待派单' WHEN 1 THEN '待接单' WHEN 2 THEN '处理中' WHEN 3 THEN '待验收' WHEN 4 THEN '已完成' WHEN 5 THEN '已关闭' WHEN 6 THEN '已取消' ELSE '未知' END AS label, COUNT(1) AS count, CASE wo.order_status WHEN 0 THEN '#faad14' WHEN 1 THEN '#1890ff' WHEN 2 THEN '#722ed1' WHEN 3 THEN '#13c2c2' WHEN 4 THEN '#52c41a' WHEN 5 THEN '#909399' WHEN 6 THEN '#d9d9d9' ELSE '#909399' END AS color FROM tbl_work_order wo WHERE wo.deleted = 0 GROUP BY wo.order_status ORDER BY wo.order_status

SELECT wo.id, CONCAT('工单 ', wo.order_no, ' ', CASE wo.order_status WHEN 0 THEN '待派单' WHEN 1 THEN '待接单' WHEN 2 THEN '处理中' WHEN 3 THEN '待验收' ELSE '待处理' END) AS text, CASE wo.order_status WHEN 0 THEN '待派单' WHEN 1 THEN '待接单' WHEN 2 THEN '处理中' ELSE '待处理' END AS tag, CASE wo.fault_level WHEN 1 THEN 'danger' WHEN 2 THEN 'warning' ELSE 'info' END AS type FROM tbl_work_order wo WHERE wo.order_status IN (0, 1, 2) AND wo.deleted = 0 ORDER BY wo.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tbl_equipment WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tbl_equipment WHERE status = 1 AND deleted = 0

SELECT eq.status AS `key`, CASE eq.status WHEN 1 THEN '运行中' WHEN 2 THEN '空闲' WHEN 3 THEN '故障' ELSE '离线' END AS label, COUNT(1) AS count, CASE eq.status WHEN 1 THEN '#059669' WHEN 2 THEN '#d97706' WHEN 3 THEN '#dc2626' ELSE '#909399' END AS color FROM tbl_equipment eq WHERE eq.deleted = 0 GROUP BY eq.status ORDER BY eq.status

SELECT CONCAT(wo.order_no, ' ', CASE wo.order_status WHEN 0 THEN '已创建' WHEN 1 THEN '已接单' WHEN 2 THEN '已到达' WHEN 3 THEN '待验收' WHEN 4 THEN '已完成' WHEN 5 THEN '已关闭' WHEN 6 THEN '已取消' ELSE '已更新' END) AS title, COALESCE(eq.equipment_name, '') AS `desc`, DATE_FORMAT(wo.update_time, '%H:%i') AS `time`, CASE wo.order_status WHEN 0 THEN '#1890ff' WHEN 1 THEN '#13c2c2' WHEN 2 THEN '#722ed1' WHEN 3 THEN '#faad14' WHEN 4 THEN '#52c41a' ELSE '#909399' END AS color FROM tbl_work_order wo LEFT JOIN tbl_equipment eq ON wo.equipment_id = eq.id WHERE DATE(wo.update_time) = CURDATE() AND wo.deleted = 0 ORDER BY wo.update_time DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT CASE wo.fault_level WHEN 1 THEN 'CRITICAL' WHEN 2 THEN 'WARNING' ELSE 'INFO' END AS level, CONCAT(COALESCE(eq.equipment_name, '设备'), ': ', LEFT(wo.fault_description, 40)) AS message, DATE_FORMAT(wo.create_time, '%H:%i') AS `time` FROM tbl_work_order wo LEFT JOIN tbl_equipment eq ON wo.equipment_id = eq.id WHERE wo.fault_level IN (1, 2) AND wo.order_status NOT IN (4, 5, 6) AND wo.deleted = 0 ORDER BY wo.fault_level ASC, wo.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT eq.equipment_name AS name, GREATEST( 100 - COALESCE( (SELECT COUNT(1) * 10 FROM tbl_work_order wo2 WHERE wo2.equipment_id = eq.id AND wo2.deleted = 0 AND wo2.create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH)), 0), 10 ) AS score FROM tbl_equipment eq WHERE eq.deleted = 0 ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tbl_work_order WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tbl_sys_user WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT DISTINCT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') AS month FROM tbl_work_order WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY month DESC
